title: Eternal Nether Star│永恆的下界之星
description: Nether stars no longer clear after 10 minutes. Same as Bedrock Edition.│下界之星不會在10分鐘後清除。與基岩版一致。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
- The entity form of a nether star does not automatically disappear after 10 minutes, but exists forever. Same as Bedrock Edition.│物品實體型態的下界之星不會在10分鐘後被自動清除掉，而是永遠存在。與基岩版一致。
- Nether star item entities are immune to all damage.(This feature requires the "[Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)" mod to be installed in order to function.)│下界之心物品實體免疫一切傷害。（這個功能需要安裝模組"[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)"才能運作）
